message:
fix(reactor): flush io_uring SQ before rearming wake poll

Extract rearm_wake_poll() with retry-on-full-SQ logic so the wake fd
poll entry is never silently dropped when the submission queue is full.
Propagate errors instead of ignoring them with let-underscore. Add
fill_submission_queue test helper and a test verifying the flush-retry
path handles full SQ without leaking spurious NOP completions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
